makecode_ts.source:
input.onButtonPressed(Button.A, function () {
    music._playDefaultBackground(music.builtInPlayableMelody(Melodies.Prelude), music.PlaybackMode.InBackground)
    for (let index = 0; index < 2; index++) {
        basic.showLeds(`
            . . . . .
            . . . . .
            . . # . .
            . . . . .
            . . . . .
            `)
        basic.pause(100)
        basic.showLeds(`
            . . . . .
            . # # # .
            . # # # .
            . # # # .
            . . . . .
            `)
        basic.pause(100)
        basic.showLeds(`
            # # # # #
            # # # # #
            # # # # #
            # # # # #
            # # # # #
            `)
        basic.pause(1000)
        basic.showLeds(`
            . . . . .
            . # # # .
            . # # # .
            . # # # .
            . . . . .
            `)
        basic.pause(1000)
        basic.showLeds(`
            . . . . .
            . . . . .
            . . # . .
            . . . . .
            . . . . .
            `)
    }
})
input.onButtonPressed(Button.AB, function () {
    if (input.lightLevel() < 50) {
        music._playDefaultBackground(music.builtInPlayableMelody(Melodies.PowerDown), music.PlaybackMode.InBackground)
        basic.showLeds(`
            . . # # .
            . . . # #
            . . . # #
            . . . # #
            . . # # .
            `)
    } else {
        music._playDefaultBackground(music.builtInPlayableMelody(Melodies.PowerUp), music.PlaybackMode.InBackground)
        basic.showLeds(`
            # . # . #
            . # # # .
            # # # # #
            . # # # .
            # . # . #
            `)
    }
    basic.pause(5000)
})
input.onButtonPressed(Button.B, function () {
    music._playDefaultBackground(music.builtInPlayableMelody(Melodies.BaDing), music.PlaybackMode.InBackground)
    basic.clearScreen()
    basic.pause(100)
    basic.showString("Hello!")
})
input.onGesture(Gesture.Shake, function () {
    music._playDefaultBackground(music.builtInPlayableMelody(Melodies.JumpUp), music.PlaybackMode.InBackground)
    basic.showIcon(IconNames.Surprised)
    basic.pause(1000)
    basic.clearScreen()
})
basic.showIcon(IconNames.Happy)

micropython.source:
# Imports go at the top
from microbit import *
import music


display.show(Image.HAPPY)

while True:
    sleep(300)
    if button_a.is_pressed() and button_b.is_pressed():
        if display.read_light_level() < 50:
            music.play(music.POWER_DOWN, wait=False)
            display.show(Image('00990:'
                               '00099:'
                               '00099:'
                               '00099:'
                               '00990'))
        else:
            music.play(music.POWER_UP, wait=False)
            display.show(Image('90909:'
                               '09990:'
                               '99999:'
                               '09990:'
                               '90909'))
    elif button_b.is_pressed():
        music.play(music.BA_DING, wait=False)
        display.clear()
        sleep(100)
        display.scroll('Hello!')
    elif button_a.is_pressed():
        music.play(music.PRELUDE, wait=False)
        for i in range(2):
            display.show(Image('00000:'
                               '00000:'
                               '00900:'
                               '00000:'
                               '00000'))
            sleep(100)
            display.show(Image('00000:'
                               '09990:'
                               '09990:'
                               '09990:'
                               '00000'))
            sleep(100)
            display.show(Image('99999:'
                               '99999:'
                               '99999:'
                               '99999:'
                               '99999'))
            sleep(1000)
            display.show(Image('00000:'
                               '09990:'
                               '09990:'
                               '09990:'
                               '00000'))
            sleep(1000)
            display.show(Image('00000:'
                               '00000:'
                               '00900:'
                               '00000:'
                               '00000'))
            sleep(1000)
    elif accelerometer.is_gesture('shake'):
        music.play(music.JUMP_UP, wait=False)
        display.show(Image.SURPRISED)
